name: primary_key
description: Optional source-side stable row identifier. Silver/gold writeback synthesizes one when needed.

name: site_id
description: Site/category identifier used by --group-column site_id in the split CLI.

name: co2_flux
description: EddyPro CO2 flux; represented as NEE in silver/gold payloads.

name: qc_co2_flux
description: QC class for co2_flux; represented as QC_NEE in silver/gold payloads.

name: air_temperature
description: Air temperature in K; represented as Tair after unit conversion.

name: VPD
description: Vapor pressure deficit; consumed by gap filling and partitioning.

name: H
description: Sensible heat flux; preserved through silver/gold when present.

name: LE
description: Latent heat flux; preserved through silver/gold when present.

name: RH
description: Relative humidity source column when present in flux exports. M31 canonicalizes this logical field to rH in stage payloads.
